form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 46-day let-up. First-up after four months won by 1.5 len at Veliefendi All Weather February 28 over 1400m defeating Statue Of Liberty with 58kg at $4.60. Previously second-up won by a 0.1 len at Veliefendi All Weather October 12 over 1500m defeating Aimus Liberatus with 53kg at $5.90. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at Antalya in G3 on March 12 over 1700m, 38 len behind Bay Nalcakan carrying 58kg at $5.20. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at Yil in G1 on August 16 over 1300m, 0.1 len behind Metal Heart carrying 57kg at $6.50. Must improve significantly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months 5th of 9 at Veliefendi All Weather on March 18 over 1500m, 8 len behind Wolf Rules carrying 55kg at $7. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Veliefendi All Weather on December 6 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Rock For Ever carrying 57kg at $2. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 2nd in a small field at Yesiloba All Weather on March 31 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Whisper Of Victory with 50kg at $1.65. Previously second-up scored a big 7 len win at Yesiloba All Weather January 27 over 1200m defeating My Son Bera carrying 58kg at $1.35. Should progress from that first-up run.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. When well in the market at debut, won by 1.1 len at Veliefendi All Weather February 28 over 1300m defeating Taliphan Bey carrying 58kg at $3.70. Last start 6th of 9 at Veliefendi All Weather on March 18 over 1500m, 8 len behind Wolf Rules with 55kg at $23.45. Looks to be making up the numbers.

form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 14 at Sirinyer in G3 on March 29 over 1700m, on heavy track; 4.5 len behind Kralin Dansi carrying 58kg at $10.65. Before that ran last in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 1 over 1600m, 15 len behind Hard Runner with 56kg at $4.40. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Yet to taste defeat in two starts. When well in the market on debut, won by 8 len at Veliefendi All Weather February 14 over 1500m defeating Kara Biga carrying 58kg at $2.45. Last start scored a big 3 len win at Veliefendi All Weather March 18 over 1500m defeating True Blue with 56kg at $1.40. Well-placed and should prove hard to beat.
